title: Double-Entry Bookkeeping
description: Double-entry bookkeeping tracks every economic event as balanced debits and credits across accounts. It provides the accounting lens needed to compare legacy ledgers with Bitcoin's UTXO accounting model.

resources.title: The Ascent of Money (Niall Ferguson)
resources.notes: Historical finance context, including bookkeeping evolution and monetary infrastructure.

resources.title: Wikipedia: Double-entry Bookkeeping
resources.notes: Practical introduction to debit/credit logic, balancing constraints, and the historical accounting model.

resources.title: Bitcoin Developer Guide: Transactions
resources.notes: Useful contrast between account-based intuition and UTXO-based accounting.

resources.title: Layered Money
resources.notes: Good bridge between legacy ledger layers, banking abstractions, and Bitcoin's accounting model.
